title: Syrian Citrusy Chicken Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make stir fry dish featuring chicken and citrusy notes.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes. Remove and set aside.
Add more oil if necessary, then add the cumin and cook for 1 minute.
Add the garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the long beans and cook until they start to soften, about 3 minutes.
Add the stir-fry sauce, citrusy zest, and chicken spice blend. Stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the wok and stir to coat with the sauce.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot and garnish with additional citrusy zest if desired.
